button.label: Refresh
button.screentip: Update character counts and progress bars
button.supertip: Analyzes your document structure and displays character counts with visual progress bars. Green = within optimal range, Orange = approaching limits, Red = exceeds target length. Works with any document size from sermons to dissertations.

toggleButton.label: Speech Time
toggleButton.screentip: Toggle between character count and speech time display
toggleButton.supertip: Switch between showing raw character counts or estimated speech/reading time. Speech time is calculated based on your personal reading tempo (adjustable with Set Tempo button). Useful for presentations, sermons, and timed content.

button.label: Set Tempo
button.supertip: Set your personal reading speed to get accurate speech time estimates. Default is 180 characters per minute. Automatically enables Speech Time mode when configured.

toggleButton.label: AutoSave
toggleButton.supertip: When enabled, TextBalance automatically saves your document after each update.

button.label: Everything
button.screentip: Remove all TextBalance data from this document
button.supertip: Completely removes the summary table, all heading annotations, progress bars, and stored settings from the current document. The TextBalance add-in remains installed and available for other documents.

button.label: Annotations
button.screentip: Remove only heading annotations and progress bars
button.supertip: Removes all visual indicators (character counts, percentages, and progress bars) from headings while preserving the summary table and its data. Quick way to clean up headings for final document presentation.

button.label: Table
button.supertip: Removes the character count summary table while keeping all heading annotations and progress bars intact. Use this if you want to keep visual indicators but remove the detailed breakdown table.

button.label: Help
button.screentip: Learn the basics of using TextBalance
button.supertip: Get started with headings, document structure, and CharCounter basics.

button.label: Report an issue
button.screentip: Report a bug or an issue
button.supertip: Open the feedback page in your browser to share suggestions, bug reports, or comments about TextBalance.

button.label: Support
button.supertip: If you find TextBalance useful, consider buying the developer a hot chocolate (he doesn't like coffee). Thank you for your support!

button.label: Check for updates
button.screentip: Check for the latest version of TextBalance
button.supertip: Checks if a newer version of TextBalance is available and prompts you to update if one is found.
